content:
Successfully secured bail for my client in a matter involving allegations under the NDPS Act and the Madhya Pradesh Drug Control Act.

Grateful for the trust reposed in me.

comment: NDPS bail under s37 still turns heavily on ‘reasonable grounds’ and recovery thresholds; post-order compliance conditions often end up defining the real liberty more than the grant itself.
